title: FPS+
description: Fabric Powered: Combines the most up-to-date and efficient optimization mods.
body:
## 📥 How to Install

1. Download and install a modern Minecraft launcher (like Prism, Modrinth, or CurseForge).
2. Search for **FPS+** in the modpack section.
3. Click **Install**, allocate at least 2-4 GB of RAM, and enjoy your buttery-smooth gameplay!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 🟩 FPS+ — Ultimate Performance Modpack

**FPS+** is a lightweight, system-friendly Minecraft modpack specifically designed to maximize your frame rates and deliver the smoothest gameplay experience possible. Built on the ultra-fast **Fabric API**, it focuses purely on boosting performance, eliminating micro-stutters, and lowering memory usage without changing the vanilla game mechanics you love.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


![Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba432f96aeff0d2f377441acf9320d56901cf557_0.webp)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### 🛠️ Included Features & Optimizations

| Feature |  Status | 
| :--- | :---: |
|  **Litematica** | ✅ Included |
|  **İtem İnfo** | ✅ Included |
|  **Shulker İnfo** | ✅ Included |
|  **Zoom** | ✅ Included |
|  **Shaders** | ✅ Included | 
|  **Freecam** | ✅ Included |
|  **Fullbright** | ✅ Included
|  **Dynamic Lights** | ✅ Included |
|  **Smart Leaves** | ✅ Included |


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


## System Setup

⚙️Hardware and Software

| Component | Specification |
| :--- | :--- |
| **OS** | Windows 11 Home Single Language |
| **CPU** | 13th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-13500H (2.60 GHz)   |
| **GPU** | NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 6GB Laptop GPU (6 GB)   |
| **RAM** | 12 GB   |


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
